content_body:
We've all had those moments when we've wished the snow would just come to an end. It's cold and wet and makes it hard to get where we want to go. Sometimes, it's easy to forget the beauty and wonder this time of year can offer, but these gorgeous photos will have you singing "Let it Snow" in no time—and leave you longing for a winter getaway in the mountains!

 

A stunning snowy mountain view.

 

The forest around Lake Blue Ridge transformed into a wintery wonderland.

 

Bundled-up hike, anyone?

 

A peaceful Wilscot Creek with a dusting of snow.

 

Winter looks good on Lake Blue Ridge.

 

Who wouldn't want to cozy up next to a fire and enjoy this gorgeous sight of a wintery Toccoa River?

 

Another Toccoa River shot with blue skies and just the right touch of snow.

 

The beauty of fresh, untouched snow on the front porch.

 

What are you waiting for? Grab your friends, family, or even just your sweetheart, and book your next winter getaway in the mountains!
title: Wishing for Snow in Blue Ridge
